metadata.name: Titanium Carbide
metadata.title: Titanium Carbide Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing titanium carbide laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Alessandro Moretti
author.title: Ph.D.
credentials: Assisted in EU Horizon 2020 laser additive projects, 2016-2019
author.imageAlt: Alessandro Moretti, Ph.D., Materials Engineer at Politecnico di Milano's Materials Dept., in research lab

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Titanium Carbide surface cleaning without substrate damage

wavelength.description: Near-IR wavelength optimized for Titanium Carbide absorption and minimal substrate interaction

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for precise cleaning of Titanium Carbide surfaces

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for continuous cleaning coverage with thermal management

fluenceThreshold.description: Minimum fluence required for effective Titanium Carbide contaminant removal

pulseWidth.description: Nanosecond pulse duration for efficient ablation of Titanium Carbide contaminants

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for efficient cleaning coverage

passCount.description: Recommended number of passes for complete contaminant removal

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap for uniform cleaning without excessive thermal buildup
